name: PRAP Japan, Inc.
summary: PRAP Japan, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a public relations consultancy company in Japan. The company provides crisis communications support services; purpose-built media training studio services; event management; and digital influence services. The company serves healthcare, finance, energy, automobiles, culture/fashion/art, travel and retail, food and restaurants, and information technology industries. PRAP Japan, Inc. was founded in 1970 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
